<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Download Artifact by Tag"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/artifact/raw/{namespace}/{name}/tag/{tag}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Download raw artifact content for a version referenced by tag.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
